{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231524100D7E0967AFB91FEF84D5"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618146653036790590","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"剧情过得去，对流氓混混描写的非常好，就是太肮脏猥琐了，没什么美感。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773741560,"group_id":"7612313664514690073","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N3vIKJLk9CkX4Qb+zDfav28Q/fJa8j5/aRykrWKUjnXZ","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/a9f271be9c304660a4ea1bc726a2dda1~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776789053&x-signature=wCNLnPubgo6ZNXAAyLvxN2F%2FpP0%3D","user_id":"4252537748199677","user_name":"惺惺相惜的双斧战龙"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4252537748199677","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"svip","icon":"{"icon_default_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/07d37b2c30d271228698f77f4f7f7daf","icon_dark_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/d67f15fefbb4470bb54c773eb84e90d8","icon_width":26,"icon_height":16}","intro":"{"title_name":"svip","title_id":"svip","icon_type":1}","is_author_title":false,"is_vip_title":true,"zh_title":"svip"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7612313664514690073","book_info":{"abstract":"1941年的上海孤岛，人命如草芥。小混混贺老六看着脚边跟自己长得一模一样、被打成马蜂窝的76号特务亲哥，刚想溜，就被黑洞洞的枪口顶住了后脑勺。为了活命，他只能扒下死鬼老五的血衣裹在身上，以底层狗腿子的身份一脚踏进极司菲尔路76号的魔窟。
没受过专业训练，不懂半句电码，身处三方绞肉机中，贺老六唯一能依靠的，只有致命危险来临前那如同野兽般疯狂预警的直觉！枪口暗杀？他提前就地翻滚撒石灰；高层毒酒局？他先干为敬转头就抠嗓子催吐！他将市井泼皮的狡猾与下三路打法发挥到极致，在刀尖上疯狂苟活。
直到大佐被炸飞，76号处长被算计致死，各方大佬才惊恐地发现，那个被他们视为贪财好色的废物混混，才是隐藏最深的谍战之王。
“想弄死我？老子先挖了你们的祖坟！”
当黑暗笼罩孤岛，谁说流氓不能以命殉国？！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o87fd34bbc2b0d0e07088ad8c510ffa64~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"浪子回头金","author_id":"","book_id":"7612313664514690073","book_name":"谍战：我一个瘪三，全靠直觉活命","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182028","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2270人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":504,"name":"抗战谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=504&name=抗战谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":507,"name":"谍战","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=507&name=谍战&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7612313704910045721","read_count":"2270","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"159582"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"64","tags":"抗战谍战,都市,谍战","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o87fd34bbc2b0d0e07088ad8c510ffa64~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434650&x-signature=dDqR1YJRSMkYwNFa84CNTvB6FyQ%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1822330852484708","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603231524100D7E0967AFB91FEF84D5"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读56分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":2222,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3363,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":8},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4}],"extra":{"book_info":{"abstract":"","audio_thumb_uri":"","author":"","author_id":"","book_id":"7612313664514690073","book_name":"","book_type":"","co
